dreaming.mode.label: Dreaming Mode
dreaming.mode.help: Select dreaming mode: off, core, deep, or rem.

dreaming.frequency.label: Dreaming Frequency
dreaming.frequency.help: Optional cron cadence override for managed dreaming runs.

dreaming.timezone.label: Dreaming Timezone
dreaming.timezone.help: IANA timezone for the managed dreaming cron schedule.

dreaming.limit.label: Promotion Limit
dreaming.limit.help: Maximum short-term candidates promoted per dreaming run (set to 0 to skip promotions).

dreaming.minScore.label: Promotion Min Score
dreaming.minScore.help: Minimum weighted rank required for automatic promotion.

dreaming.minRecallCount.label: Promotion Min Recalls
dreaming.minRecallCount.help: Minimum recall count required for automatic promotion.

dreaming.minUniqueQueries.label: Promotion Min Queries
dreaming.minUniqueQueries.help: Minimum unique query count required for automatic promotion.
